message:
refactor(tui): extract search result rendering, apply clippy fixes and rustfmt

Search screen refactoring:
- Extract module-level constants: RESULTS_MIN_TITLE_CHARS,
  RESULTS_MIN_SNIPPET_CHARS, RESULTS_MAX_SNIPPET_CHARS_IN_LIST,
  RESULTS_SNIPPET_SEP
- Create ResultListRenderCfg struct to bundle render parameters
- Extract result_entry_line() function from inline render loop
- Extract created_time_hms() helper for timestamp formatting
- Replace match-on-Option with map_or_else in highlight_spans
- Thread highlight_terms and sort_direction through to render methods

Analytics screen improvements:
- Add Default impl for AnalyticsScreen
- Make severity_badge() a const fn
- Add confidence.clamp(0.0, 1.0) with truncation lint allowances
- Add #[allow(clippy::missing_const_for_fn)] where needed
- Reorder imports alphabetically

Formatting cleanup across TUI crates:
- Collapse multi-line serde_json/assert_eq calls (lib.rs)
- Fix import wrapping and indentation alignment (tui_app.rs)
- Collapse header.render() call (tui_chrome.rs)
- Reformat is_suppressible chain and binding inserts (tui_keymap.rs)
- Collapse multi-line chains in startup_compat.rs
- Clean up assert! formatting in static_render.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
